name: ZAP 2: Stripe Payment → Consent Ledger → Creator Notification

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ value: { ...($json), alert: `Payment received: $${$json.amount} ${$json.currency} — Creator: $${$json.creator_split} / Platform: $${$json.platform_split}` } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: `Payment received. ${$json.amount} ${$json.currency}. Creator gets ${$json.creator_split}. Plowman Standard enforced.` }) }}
